news.headline: Flutter Entertainment is set to report Q4 and Full Year 2024 financial results on March 4, 2025, with a conference call.
news.summary: Flutter Entertainment, a leading gambling company, will announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 4, 2025. The company will also conduct a conference call on the same day to discuss the results with investors and analysts. This update is highly anticipated, as investors are eager to learn about the company's performance in a critical period. The fourth quarter is always a significant time for businesses, and analysts will closely examine the numbers to gauge Flutter Entertainment's growth and profitability. This move indicates transparency and the company's commitment to keeping stakeholders informed about its financial health. Overall, this announcement will provide valuable insights into Flutter Entertainment's operations and its position in the market.

news.headline: Altitude Lab startups secure $154M funding; Elnora AI CEO wins $150,000 fellowship. Key cohort milestones announced.
news.summary: Elnora AI CEO has been granted a $150,000 fellowship by The Accelerator. Additionally, The Accelerator has disclosed significant cohort milestones.

news.headline: Sleepypod's pet carriers are first to meet top safety ratings in independent testing by CPS, based on new standards.
news.summary: A company based in Pasadena, Sleepypod®, has introduced a line of pet carriers that have become the initial car safety restraints for pets meeting key crash test requirements in recent independent testing by the Center for Pet Safety (CPS). The carriers were tested under the new CPS-001-016.02 pet restraint system standard, aligning with the revised U.S. child restraint system standard FMVSS 213b. The successful testing marks a significant milestone as Sleepypod® prioritizes pet safety during transportation.

news.headline: US to sell $85 bln 4-week bills on February 20th, to settle on February 25th.
Russia’s Deputy PM Novak: CPC pipeline repairs are to take at least several months.
Champion Safe Co. exceeds sales goals with $2.4M YTD 2025 revenue, surpassing $610K at NBS and Sports Inc. shows.
news.summary: In Provo, UT, a leading gun safe and vault doors manufacturer, Champion Safe Company, under American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), has reported significant success in 2025. The company has exceeded its sales expectations by generating over $2.4 million in revenue so far. Notably, more than $610,000 of this revenue was earned during recent shows with Nation’s Best Sports (NBS) and Sports Inc. buying groups. Champion continues to maintain a strong performance in the market.

news.headline: Insurgents advance in DRC, seizing Bukavu after Goma; Alphamin Resources notes mining operations at risk, monitoring closely.
news.summary: In Grand Baie, Mauritius, on Feb. 18, 2025, Alphamin Resources Corp. (AFM:TSXV, APH:JSE AltX) has acknowledged recent reports of insurgents seizing Bukavu, the second largest city in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), following the capture of Goma in late January. Alphamin's mine is currently operating within guidance parameters in a remote area, although the insurgent advance has raised the operating risk profile. Further escalation of the conflict could impact mining operations, prioritizing the safety of employees and compliance with laws. Alphamin is closely monitoring the situation and will provide updates as necessary to ensure safety and operational continuity.

news.headline: Allied Properties REIT declares $0.15 per unit distribution for February 2025, $1.80 per unit annually. Payable March 17.
news.summary: Today, in Toronto, Allied Properties REIT disclosed that its Trustees have approved a distribution of $0.15 per unit for February 2025, totaling $1.80 annually. This distribution will be disbursed on March 17, 2025, to unitholders recorded as of February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Prosafe SE sells Safe Concordia vessel for USD 5 million; delivery expected between March and June 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Prosafe SE announced that one of its subsidiaries had agreed to sell the Safe Concordia, a semi-submersible vessel built in 2005, to an undisclosed buyer for a total of USD 5 million, excluding commissions and expenses. The transfer of ownership is scheduled to take place after the completion of the vessel's existing charter commitments, which is anticipated to occur between March and June 2025. The finalization of the sale is dependent on standard closing terms and conditions.

news.headline: Cabaletta Bio reports positive clinical results with Rese-cel, including 3 SLE patients in remission, 1 LN patient with complete response, and 1 dermatomyositis patient showing major improvement in TIS. Patients have discontinued immunosuppressants and steroids.
news.summary: The effectiveness of the treatment continued to improve over time as three patients with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) achieved remission in the DORIS study. Furthermore, the initial Lupus Nephritis (LN) patient attained complete renal response, and the first patient with dermatomyositis sustained a significant improvement according to the Total Improvement Score (TIS). All these patients have ceased using immunosuppressants and have either stopped or are gradually reducing steroid usage as per the most recent follow-up.

news.headline: Spirit Blockchain Capital closes successful Life offering, paving the way for expanding digital asset management and blockchain infrastructure.
news.summary: A recent funding round has paved the way for significant growth in digital asset management and blockchain infrastructure. With a substantial amount of funding secured, the company is now in a strong position to expand its operations and enhance its technological capabilities. This strategic financing will propel the company towards its goals of expanding its digital asset management services and strengthening its blockchain infrastructure. The investment received will enable the company to leverage new opportunities in these fast-growing sectors and solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: GivBux secures $100M from UAE firm for international expansion, acquisitions, and payment system in Canada, Mexico, UAE.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California on February 18, 2025, GivBux, Inc. (OTC: GBUX), a Super App and charitable giving platform, disclosed its agreement with Intelligent Investment Holding LTD (IIH) from Abu Dhabi, UAE for a capital infusion of $100 million. The funding aims to support acquisitions, international user acquisition plans, and expedite the development of an international payment system in Canada, Mexico, and the UAE. The LOI outlines a joint venture where GivBux and IIH will equally share UAE-based revenue from the GivBux Payment Platform. This non-binding agreement intends to evolve into a final pact, reinforcing GivBux’s assets and market position through strategic acquisitions, while enhancing global transaction effectiveness and financial reach.

news.headline: IBA to host Capital Markets Day on April 7, 2025 at 2pm CET for investors and analysts. Event key for shareholders.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium, IBA (Ion Beam Applications S.A., EURONEXT) announced its plan to conduct a Capital Markets Day (CMD) targeting investors and analysts. The event is scheduled to take place on Monday, April 7, 2025, at 2pm CET / 1pm GMT / 8am ET, offering insights into the company's particle accelerator technology. IBA, as the global leader in this sector, aims to engage stakeholders and provide valuable information during this session.

news.headline: Equinor ASA corrected dividend announcement date to be 20 February 2025, correcting previous error.
news.summary: This correction pertains to a previous stock market announcement (SMA) issued on 24 October 2024 with messageID 630239. The correction is being made due to an error in stating the date for announcing the dividend per share in NOK. The accurate date for disclosing the dividend per share in NOK is 20 February 2025.

news.headline: Heimar hf.'s Annual General Meeting set for March 11, 2025, at Gróska in Reykjavík at 16:00.
news.summary: Heimar hf. has scheduled its Annual General Meeting to take place at the Eiriksdottir hall, Gróska, Bjargargata 1, 102 Reykjavík, on Tuesday, March 11, 2025, at 4:00 PM. This important meeting marks a key event for the company's stakeholders.

news.headline: Síminn hf. released Q4 2024 and full-year 2024 results, showing [important numbers].
EXL's LDS platform named as 'Luminary' in Celent report for NA Life Insurance Systems. A significant achievement for the company.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, EXL, a prominent data and AI company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EXLS, revealed that it has achieved Luminary status in the Celent report titled New Business and Underwriting Systems: North America Life Insurance Edition. This recognition solidifies EXL's position as a leader in the industry, highlighting its innovative contributions in the North American life insurance sector.

news.headline: Pam Grier launches Pam Grier's Soul Flix, increasing Free TV Networks' portfolio to 4 digital broadcast networks and 3 FAST channels.
news.summary: Actress and activist Pam Grier's network, Soul Flix, has expanded Free TV Networks' lineup to four digital broadcast networks and three FAST channels. The collaboration was announced on February 18, 2025, in Atlanta. This partnership brings in significant artwork that can be viewed at freetvnetworks.com/soulflixpr.

news.headline: Kremlin Aide: The US is to choose a separate envoy, not Kellogg, for peace talks with Russia. Kellogg to talk to Kyiv and Europe - Tass.
Mexico Economy Minister Ebrard travels to Washington on Wednesday.
U-Haul provides 30 days free storage for flood victims in KY & TN, 29 centers offering help.
news.summary: In response to the severe flooding in Louisville, Kentucky, a total of 29 U-Haul® centers are providing assistance to affected residents. This includes 18 centers across Kentucky, offering 30 days of free self-storage and U-Box® container usage. Additionally, the U-Haul disaster relief program is available to those in need at nine stores in northern Middle Tennessee and two in southern Indiana. The flooding, caused by a massive winter weather front, resulted in tragic flash flooding over the weekend, impacting numerous homes with water damage.

news.headline: Russia’s Deputy PM Novak: We see a reduction in pumping volume by about 30-40% after the attack on the CPC pipeline.
LINE-X ready for future demand in upfitting services, with strategic focus for long-term success. Leader for 30 years.
news.summary: A top player in the upfitting services sector, LINE-X, based in Charlotte, N.C., is gearing up for a surge in demand. With a strong foothold in the industry for more than three decades, the company is capitalizing on strategic progress made in the last year. The renewed focus is aimed at realigning operations to meet expected increased demand for their services.

news.headline: Ethereum struggles to maintain $2,700, uncertainty over rally. Key numbers: ETH $2,677.31, $322.7B Market Cap.
news.summary: Over the weekend, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) surged to $2,826, raising hopes for a lasting uptrend. However, the excitement was short-lived as it quickly retraced to $2,700, leading traders to question if the rally has been postponed or if Ethereum remains susceptible. Ethereum's current price stands at $2,677.31 with a market capitalization of $322.7 billion, presenting a 4.4% decline in the last 24 hours but a 0.8% increase over the past seven days. In comparison, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is priced at $95,415.78 with a market cap of $1.89 trillion, reflecting a 0.9% decrease in the 24-hour trend and a 1.6% decrease over seven days. XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is sitting at $2.55 with a market cap of $147.9 billion, showing a 4.6% drop in the last 24 hours but a 3.6% increase over a week. Crypto trader Michael van de Poppe noted that Ethereum's failure to close above crucial levels implies the delay of the upward movement, anticipating a retest of lower levels before a potential upward shift in the market sentiment.

news.headline: NSU to host AI Forum with Dr. Julian Bailes, Dr. Neilank Jha, and Monty Chicola, showcasing leadership in AI innovation.
news.summary: Northwestern State University in Natchitoches, Louisiana, under the guidance of President James Genovese, is advancing its status as a key player in artificial intelligence and innovation. With a focus on attracting industry experts, the university is set to launch a groundbreaking public initiative. This move is aimed at solidifying its position in the field, with notable advancements expected in 2025.

news.headline: Global Center for Energy Analysis introduces 5 inaugural fellows, led by Joseph McMonigle, for innovative energy policy research.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Washington, the Global Center for Energy Analysis (GCEA) introduced its first five fellows, prestigious energy analysts and communicators, to spearhead research on innovative energy policy approaches. Led by President Joseph McMonigle, the GCEA aims to revolutionize the energy sector through the expertise of these fellows.

news.headline: EarthTronics introduces new 8-foot T8 LED with interchangeable base for maximum energy savings in various industries.
news.summary: In Norton Shores, Michigan, EarthTronics is launching a new Type B 8’ Wattage and Color Selectable direct wire LED T8. This product features a double-end interchangeable base for easy replacement of T8 and T12 linear tubes. It operates on a voltage range of 120-277V, ensuring maximum energy savings and lower maintenance expenses. This LED is suitable for various settings including commercial, retail, municipal, industrial, and educational institutions.

news.headline: Nihon Global Growth Partners highlights value at Toyo Suisan with 4% ownership, says company at critical point.
news.summary: Today, a group of investors led by Nihon Global Growth Partners Management Inc. presented an investor briefing on Toyo Suisan Kaisha Ltd. (2875.T) (“Toyo Suisan”). The Investor Group, owning around 4% of the Company's common shares, including NHGGP, shared their perspective on Toyo Suisan's current situation. NHGGP highlighted their view that the Company is at a significant turning point. The investor presentation is available for viewing online.

news.headline: TruLite Health in Tempe, AZ expands leadership team to boost health equity expertise, with Walter D. Conwell, MD, MBA as president.
news.summary: TruLite Health, a healthcare company based in TEMPE, Arizona, has recently made changes to its leadership team to enhance its artificial intelligence capabilities. The company, known for its health equity solution addressing clinical bias, is expanding to cater to the demands of hospital systems, educational institutions, and various healthcare organizations across the country. Walter D. Conwell, MD, MBA, has been appointed as the new president of the company. Formerly holding positions as chief diversity and inclusion officer and associate dean for faculty development, Conwell's leadership comes at a pivotal time as TruLite Health aims to bolster its services for a wider audience.

news.headline: Hull Street Energy to acquire 1,350 MW gas-fired power plant near Joliet, Illinois from Elwood Energy, a subsidiary of J-Power USA.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on Feb. 18, 2025, Hull Street Energy, LLC (HSE) revealed plans to purchase specific assets from Elwood Energy LLC, a subsidiary of J-Power USA. This deal involves acquiring a gas-fired power plant with a capacity of 1,350 MW situated close to Joliet, Illinois. Once the transaction is finalized, HSE will take ownership of the plant.

news.headline: PGW Auto Glass opens new calibration center in Houston, expanding automotive services. #PGWAutoglass
news.summary: A well-known automotive glass products and services provider, PGW Auto Glass, has recently unveiled its calibration center in Houston. This center aims to enhance the company's offerings in the region and provide advanced services to its customers. This initiative is a significant step for PGW Auto Glass and highlights its commitment to serving the automotive industry. The opening of this calibration center is expected to boost the company's presence in Houston and improve customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Claya launches personalized weight loss & wellness platform in LAS VEGAS with a comprehensive online platform & interactive app.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, a telehealth platform called Claya has recently introduced its new online platform and mobile app. This platform specializes in providing personalized weight loss and wellness solutions. This launch aims to make healthcare services more accessible to individuals seeking affordable options.

news.headline: Global Power Over Ethernet Controller market valued at $1.3 billion in 2023, set to reach $3.7 billion by 2033 with 11.7% CAGR.
news.summary: The Power over Ethernet (PoE) Controller market is experiencing significant growth, with a value of $1.3 billion in 2023 and an estimated value of $3.7 billion by 2033, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.7% from 2024 to 2033. This growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of IoT devices, smart infrastructure initiatives, advancements in network speeds, energy efficiency, and the rising demand for centralized power management. Various sectors like telecommunications, healthcare, and industrial automation are integrating PoE technology, creating new opportunities for market expansion. Companies are innovating to provide efficient and scalable power solutions, leveraging the trend toward smart buildings and smart grids for network enhancement and stability. The report covers the market forecast for the period 2024-2033 with a total of 332 pages.

news.headline: ROAR® Organic launches Dragon Fruit Punch drink, teams up with Plastic Bank for global change. #Bethlehem #OrganicDrink #PlasticBank
news.summary: In Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, ROAR® Organic, a fast-growing beverage brand known for redefining hydration, has introduced a new Dragon Fruit Punch flavor to its organic ready-to-drink range. Additionally, the company has partnered with Plastic Bank to further its dedication to exceptional taste and worldwide impact. The latest addition, Dragon Fruit Punch, aims to offer improved hydration with a bold taste.

news.headline: New Charter Technologies appoints Christopher J. Luise as COO to drive operational excellence and growth. - DENVER, Feb.18, 2025.
news.summary: Luise has been appointed to lead efforts towards operational excellence, fostering scalable growth, and improving client and employee experiences at New Charter Technologies. The company, which is backed by Oval Partners, a private equity firm in Palo Alto, shared the news on February 18, 2025. This strategic move aims to drive success and innovation within the organization.

news.headline: Toby and Amy Tabor from Floor Coverings International named 2024 Franchisees of the Year by IFA for excellence in business.
news.summary: The owners of Floor Coverings International, serving Vancouver, Washington, and Portland, Oregon, are being honored for their outstanding business practices, commitment to the community, and dedication to creating opportunities for others. This recognition comes from The International Franchise Association (IFA), and highlights the company as the top flooring franchise. The owners' exceptional work has not only benefited their franchise, but also their local communities in Vancouver and Portland.

news.headline: Cable conduit systems market to reach USD 14.28 billion by 2030 with 7.7% CAGR growth, driven by demand for efficient cable management solutions.
news.summary: The Cable Conduit Systems Market is witnessing substantial growth driven by increasing demand for effective cable management solutions in industrial, commercial, and residential settings. With the expanding modern infrastructure, there is a growing need for structured, long-lasting, and secure wiring systems. This surge in demand has led to a significant increase in market size, which is projected to reach a value of $XX billion by the end of the forecast period. Businesses are increasingly adopting cable conduit systems to ensure efficient management of cables and enhance safety measures. This trend is expected to continue with the market experiencing a steady growth trajectory.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: We have a safe and sound banking system.
It took months for the Milei 'Libragate' scandal to unfold, involving the president of Argentina and the Libra memecoin, starting in June 2024.
news.summary: This week, an international scandal was initiated by the Libra memecoin involving the president of Argentina. The incident dates back to June 2024.

news.headline: Investors focus on Tesla's plans for fully autonomous driving in June 2025. Stock outlook debated.
news.summary: The upcoming launch of fully autonomous driving by Tesla and Elon Musk in Texas this June has investors eagerly anticipating the event. In the spotlight is Tesla stock, as analysts speculate on whether it is a buy or sell leading up to June 2025. This milestone marks the arrival of fully autonomous driving technology, with all eyes fixed on the potential implications for the company.

news.headline: United Rentals lost a $4.8 billion deal after refusing to raise its $92 per share bid for H&E Equipment Services, which received a higher offer.
news.summary: United Rentals has decided not to increase its cash bid of $92 per share for H&E Equipment Services, a deal worth $4.8 billion. Despite losing the deal, United Rentals is receiving a consolation prize. Following this announcement, United Rentals stock price has fallen.

news.headline: European defense stocks rise after Trump-Russia developments, prompting emergency meeting. US defense stocks also up.
news.summary: European defense sector shares surged following an emergency meeting prompted by diplomatic developments between President Trump and Russia. This rally in European defense stocks came amid a shifting military landscape, capturing investor interest. On the other side of the Atlantic, U.S. defense stocks also saw an uptick in response to these global events.

news.headline: Warren Buffett held firm on Apple and Chevron but reduced stakes in other stocks. Bought underperformer before plunge.
news.summary: Renowned investor Warren Buffett made notable investment moves by maintaining his positions in Apple and Chevron while downsizing his stakes in various other stocks. Additionally, he acquired shares of an S&P 500 stock before its significant downturn.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: Policy is in a very good place, we can easily move when needed.
Fed's Daly: We can't preemptively make decisions based on policy guesses.
Zip recognized as procurement innovator on Forbes Fintech 50 list for 2025. Raised $190M in Series D funding in 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Zip, the top intake and procurement orchestration platform, has achieved a significant milestone by securing a spot on the prestigious 2025 Forbes Fintech 50 list. This list showcases the most groundbreaking financial technology companies that are reshaping various sectors. Out of the 18 new additions to this year's roster, Zip stood out for its swift integration into enterprises and its impressive achievement of raising $190 million in its Series D round in October 2024. The platform's recognition underscores its growing influence in the fintech industry.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: We don't know the scope, magnitude, or timing of the new administration's policies.
SmartSKN launches K-PRO, 1st AI platform for skincare professionals, providing advanced skin analysis & product formulation.
news.summary: In Boston on February 17, 2025, SmartSKN introduced SmartSKN PRO, a pioneering AI-driven platform altering the professional skincare sector. This groundbreaking platform provides skincare professionals with advanced dermoscopic-grade skin analysis and AI-generated product formulations, revolutionizing the industry.

news.headline: Monigle study in Denver uncovers top pediatric brands & parent decision factors, highlighting human touch.
news.summary: A recent study by Monigle in Denver has uncovered the most human pediatric brands and the main factors influencing parent decision-making. The study's findings provide insights into the branding strategies that resonate most with parents, shedding light on key drivers that influence their choices. This research is significant as it examines how brands can connect with their audience on a deeper, more emotional level. By analyzing data from parents, Monigle's study offers valuable information for marketers looking to engage with this demographic effectively.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: We want to be careful before we make the next adjustment that there's enough pressure on inflation. Also, I don't want to shortchange the labor market.
